Photo.title: Photo
Photo.description: A photo captured by a guest during the event.

imageData.description: Base64 encoded image data (optimized for low-res disposable feel).

filter.description: The filter applied to the photo.

deviceId.description: Anonymous identifier for the device that took the photo.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the photo was taken.

photos.description: Collection of all photos taken during the event.
